subcodes.first_line: O thou who art associated with him who hath attained unto the presence of his Lord in the Supreme Kingdom, Jinab-i-Aqa Muhammad Hasan, regarding the exposition of Shi'ism [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منسوب من ادرک لقاء ربه فی الملکوت الاعلی جناب آقا محمد حسن تفصیل تشیع از
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @eulogies; reminiscences, @recompense; reward for belief; right action
